General.Name: Optima Automobile Group Holding Ltd
General.Description: Optima Automobile Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides after-market automotive services in Singapore and the People's Republic of China. It operates through three segments: After-market Automotive Services, Car Rental Services, and Automotive Supply Business. The After-market Automotive Services segment provides inspection, maintenance, and repair services. The Car Rental Services segment offers car rental services. The Automotive Supply Business segment trades in motor vehicles; and supplies passenger car spare parts, accessories, and automotive equipment. It also engages in the provision of franchise agency services, as well as spray painting services for motor vehicles; online marketplaces; supply of green environmental protection water energy technology; and trading of motor vehicles. Optima Automobile Group Holdings Limited was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Singapore.
